creator: ian@south-border.com
text:
So, I was able to finally fix this for myself by downloading the parsers.py and matchers.py from https://fossies.org/linux/suricata/suricata-update/suricata/update and placing them in /usr/local/lib/python3.8/site-packages/suricata/update/

https://fossies.org/linux/suricata/suricata-update/suricata/update/matchers.py

https://fossies.org/linux/suricata/suricata-update/suricata/update/parsers.py

After that suricata-update worked fine.
